---
title: "Estimate competition impact using Bartik type instrument"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8)
```

# {.tabset}

## Firm FE

### Wage
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/competition_regression/all_platforms/coarse/competition_Bartik_wage_firmFE.png"))
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/competition_regression/all_platforms/coarse/competition_Bartik_fee_firmFE.png"))
```

### Margin
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/competition_regression/all_platforms/coarse/competition_Bartik_margin_firmFE.png"))
```


## Establishment FE

### Wage
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/competition_regression/all_platforms/coarse/competition_Bartik_wage_establishmentFE.png"))
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/competition_regression/all_platforms/coarse/competition_Bartik_fee_establishmentFE.png"))
```

### Margin
```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/competition_regression/all_platforms/coarse/competition_Bartik_margin_establishmentFE.png"))
```
